title: Ro.Go.Pa.G.
director: Jean-Luc Godard, Ugo Gregoretti, Pier Paolo Pasolini
writer: Roberto Rossellini, Jean-Luc Godard, Pier Paolo Pasolini
actors: Rosanna Schiaffino, Bruce Balaban, Maria Pia Schiaffino
plot: Four short films by four different directors dealing with the principles of modern life.
